ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., drone, airplane) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was purchased */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was retired (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that flew the mission */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date the flight took place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "flight_log" TEXT /* Path to the flight log file */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., survey, inspection) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot who flew the mission */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "calibration_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the sensor needs to be calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the reading was taken during */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading (e.g., meters, degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_data" TEXT /* Calibration data for the sensor */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the data was taken during */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the data point */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing of the data point */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting of the data point */,
  "down" REAL /* Down value of the data point */,
  "utm_zone" TEXT /* UTM zone of the data point */,
  "gps_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the GPS signal (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_navigation_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attitude_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attitude data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight the data was taken during */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "velocity_north" REAL /* Velocity north of the data point */,
  "velocity_east" REAL /* Velocity east of the data point */,
  "velocity_down" REAL /* Velocity down of the data point */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll of the data point */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch of the data point */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw of the data point */,
  "compass_heading" REAL /* Compass heading of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attitude_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "pilot_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., commercial, recreational) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the pilot was certified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, pilot, maintenance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., sensor readings, navigation data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "data_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_format" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "mission_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id")
)
